summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 66 features: new export endpoints (bank-transactions, article-categories, article-templates), API key management system, X-API-Key header support, partner_code in /api/me, Profile page partner_code display, API tab in admin sidebar, ArticleCategories/Templates export+import buttons, and all 14 admin tabs. All 24 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified.

issues: Console hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select/option>' - caused by VE (Visual Editor) tooling injecting span wrappers inside select/option elements in CustomersTab. Not a real app bug - tooling artifact only. Does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). No issues found.
API key masking works correctly: raw 'key' field is removed from list response, 'key_masked' shown. Full key returned once only on creation.
Tenant isolation verified: Tenant B API keys do not appear in Platform Admin's key list.
Export endpoints correctly enforce JWT auth (unauthenticated returns 401/422).
resolve_api_key_tenant dependency correctly updates last_used_at on key usage.

The existing console error 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option/select>' is a VE tooling artifact (x-file-name, x-line-number, x-component injected attributes). The actual app HTML uses native <select> with <option> children correctly - VE wrapper injects an intermediate <span> during development only.
seed_data_creation: Test API keys were generated and revoked during backend testing (TEST_key_iter66, TEST_key_first, TEST_key_second, TEST_key_to_revoke). All cleaned up via delete/deactivation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 fully tested. Key verified features: (1) /api/me returns partner_code for all users; Tenant B admin has partner_code='tenant-b-test'. (2) Three new export endpoints: /api/admin/export/bank-transactions, /api/admin/export/article-categories, /api/admin/export/article-templates - all return 200 with CSV. (3) API key CRUD: list (masked), generate (returns full key once, deactivates old keys), revoke. (4) X-API-Key header resolves tenant on /api/products and /api/categories. (5) API tab in admin sidebar (between Website Content and Logs) with API Keys + Documentation sections (18 endpoints). (6) ArticleCategoriesTab and ArticleTemplatesTab both have Export CSV + Import CSV buttons working. (7) ImportModal opens in Customers, Catalog, Categories (and more) tabs. (8) All 14 admin tabs load without JSX errors. Frontend login uses placeholder-based selectors (no data-testid on login inputs). Admin creds: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123! / partner_code: automate-accounts. Tenant B: adminb@tenantb.local / ChangeMe123! / partner_code: tenant-b-test.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/me returns partner_code for platform admin
Backend: GET /api/me returns partner_code='tenant-b-test' for Tenant B admin
Backend: GET /api/admin/export/bank-transactions 200 for both admins
Backend: GET /api/admin/export/article-categories 200 for both admins
Backend: GET /api/admin/export/article-templates 200 for both admins
Backend: Existing export endpoints (orders, customers) still work
Backend: GET /api/admin/api-keys returns 200 with api_keys list
Backend: API keys list uses key_masked (raw key not exposed)
Backend: POST /api/admin/api-keys generates new key starting with ak_
Backend: Generating new key deactivates previous active keys
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/api-keys/{id} revokes key successfully
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/api-keys/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: Tenant B API keys isolated from Platform Admin keys (no overlap)
Backend: X-API-Key header on /api/products returns 200 with products
Backend: X-API-Key header on /api/categories returns 200 with categories
Backend: Invalid X-API-Key still returns 200 (fallback behavior)
Backend: Unauthenticated export requests return 401/403/422
Frontend: Profile page shows partner_code='tenant-b-test' (read-only) for Tenant B admin
Frontend: Admin sidebar has API tab between Website Content and Logs
Frontend: API tab loads with API Keys section (Generate Key button shown)
Frontend: API tab Documentation shows 18 endpoints organized by tag
Frontend: Endpoint cards expand/collapse with chevron
Frontend: Tag filter works (Catalog filter reduces endpoint count)
Frontend: ArticleCategoriesTab has Export CSV + Import CSV buttons
Frontend: ArticleTemplatesTab has Export CSV + Import CSV buttons
Frontend: ImportModal opens in Article Categories tab
Frontend: ImportModal opens in Article Templates tab
Frontend: ImportModal opens in Customers tab ('Import Customers')
Frontend: ImportModal opens in Catalog tab ('Import Catalog')
Frontend: ImportModal opens in Categories tab ('Import Categories')
Frontend: All 14 admin tabs load without JSX errors (customers, orders, subscriptions, promo, quotes, bank-transactions, articles, override-codes, categories, catalog, terms, website, api, sync/logs)
